description: VA schedule extrapolation 7+ children — falls back to 6-child rate per practice

notes: Schedule supports up to 6 children; 7 children fall back to 6-child marginal percentage.
Spec text §6.7.3: VA combined $50K/mo, 7 kids → uses 6-child marginal percentage per practice; notes flag surfaces. Codebase lookupChildSupportVA pushes this note when numChildren > 6.
